violations.description: Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Food contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Toaster Oven needs to be cleaned more frequently.--Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment was not cleaned properly. Observed build up of food debris around clean in place equipment.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned adequately. Observed food build up on hot/cold unit.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Observed build up of food on floor and walls.
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Design, construction, clean, maintained (1 pt deducted)
Designed, constructed, installed, and maintained (2 pts deducted)
